message:
✨ Auto-collapse recommendation panels + GA4 analytics + remove SmartCardSuggestions (#1976)

- Remove SmartCardSuggestions from Dashboard (redundant with CardRecommendations + MissionSuggestions)
- Add 20s auto-collapse countdown timer to both recommendation panels
- Timer pauses on hover, resumes on mouse leave
- Add GA4 analytics: ksc_card_recommendations_shown, ksc_card_recommendation_actioned,
  ksc_mission_suggestions_shown, ksc_mission_suggestion_actioned

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
